steps.arguments: {"inp":{"sql_query":"SELECT REPORT_DATE, ANALYSIS_START_PERIOD_DATE, ANALYSIS_END_PERIOD_DATE, ACCOUNT_NUMBER, ACCOUNT_NAME, ACCOUNT_VALUE FROM DFP_ITR_CVM WHERE CNPJ = '03.220.438/0001-73' AND ANALYSIS_END_PERIOD_DATE IN ('2024-12-31','2024-09-30') ORDER BY ANALYSIS_END_PERIOD_DATE DESC, ACCOUNT_NUMBER;"}}
steps.name: cvm_base_query_tool

steps.arguments: {"inp":{"sql_query":"SELECT REPORT_DATE, COMPANY_NAME, ORDINARY_SHARES_ISSUED, ORDINARY_SHARES_TREASURY, PREFERRED_SHARES_ISSUED, PREFERRED_SHARES_TREASURY, TOTAL_SHARES_ISSUED, TOTAL_SHARES_TREASURY FROM CVM_SHARE_COMPOSITION WHERE CNPJ = '03.220.438/0001-73' AND REPORT_DATE IN ('2024-12-31','2024-09-30') ORDER BY REPORT_DATE DESC;"}}
steps.name: cvm_composition_query_tool

steps.output:
{'status': 'success', 'report': '| REPORT_DATE | COMPANY_NAME | ORDINARY_SHARES_ISSUED | ORDINARY_SHARES_TREASURY | PREFERRED_SHARES_ISSUED | PREFERRED_SHARES_TREASURY | TOTAL_SHARES_ISSUED | TOTAL_SHARES_TREASURY |
| --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- |
| 2024-12-31 | EQUATORIAL S.A. | 1249258717 | 0 | 0 | 0 | 1249258717 | 0 |
| 2024-09-30 | EQUATORIAL S.A. | 1171152221 | 0 | 0 | 0 | 1171152221 | 0 |
'}

steps.arguments:
{"inp":{"code":"# Calculations for Equatorial Dec 2024
shares = 1249258717
price = 34.15
# Balance and P&L figures (from query)
ativo = 116412091000.0
ativo_circ = 28527346000.0
caixa = 3306364000.0
aplic_fin = 9731379000.0
disponibilidades = caixa + aplic_fin
# debts
short_debt = 6380400000.0
long_debt = 49446780000.0
div_bruta = short_debt + long_debt
div_liq = div_bruta - disponibilidades
patrim_liq_consolidado = 29887586000.0
# parent equity (patrimônio líquido atribuível à controladora)
patrimonio_liq_parent = 26113686000.0
# Revenues and profits
receita_12 = 45366675000.0
ebit_12 = 8636463000.0
lucro_liq_12 = 3767805000.0
# YTD to Sep values (for quarter calculations)
receita_ytd_sep = 32748621000.0
ebit_ytd_sep = 6466865000.0
lucro_ytd_sep = 2265001000.0
# 3-months
receita_3m = receita_12 - receita_ytd_sep
ebit_3m = ebit_12 - ebit_ytd_sep
lucro_3m = lucro_liq_12 - lucro_ytd_sep
# Market cap
market_cap = price * shares
# EPS (using attributable to parent)
lucro_atribuido_controladora = 2811675000.0
lpa = lucro_atribuido_controladora / shares
# VPA
vpa = patrimonio_liq_parent / shares
# P ratios
pl = price / lpa if lpa!=0 else None
p_vp = price / vpa if vpa!=0 else None
p_ebit = market_cap / ebit_12 if ebit_12!=0 else None
psr = market_cap / receita_12 if receita_12!=0 else None
p_ativos = market_cap / ativo if ativo!=0 else None
# capital de giro
passivo_circ = 19605209000.0
cap_giro = ativo_circ - passivo_circ
p_cap_giro = market_cap / cap_giro if cap_giro!=0 else None
p_ativ_circ_liq = market_cap / cap_giro if cap_giro!=0 else None
# EBITDA
depreciacao = 2185353000.0
ebitda = ebit_12 + depreciacao
# EV
non_controlling = 3773900000.0
ev = market_cap + div_liq + non_controlling
ev_ebitda = ev / ebitda if ebitda!=0 else None
ev_ebit = ev / ebit_12 if ebit_12!=0 else None
# margins
resultado_bruto = 13056962000.0
marg_bruta = resultado_bruto / receita_12 * 100
marg_ebit = ebit_12 / receita_12 * 100
marg_liquida = lucro_liq_12 / receita_12 * 100
# EBIT/Ativo
ebit_ativo = ebit_12 / ativo * 100
# ROIC = EBIT / (Ativo - Fornecedores - Caixa)
fornecedores = 4628036000.0
roic = ebit_12 / (ativo - fornecedores - caixa) * 100
# ROE = Lucro Líquido / Patrimônio Líquido Consolidado
roe = lucro_liq_12 / patrim_liq_consolidado * 100
# Liquidez Corr
liquidez_corr = ativo_circ / passivo_circ
# Div Br / Patrim
divbr_patrim = div_bruta / patrim_liq_consolidado
# Giro Ativos
giro_ativos = receita_12 / ativo
# Prepare results mapping
results = {
    'Ativo': ativo,
    'Disponibilidades': disponibilidades,
    'Ativo Circulante': ativo_circ,
    'Dív. Bruta': div_bruta,
    'Dív. Líquida': div_liq,
    'Patrim. Líq': patrim_liq_consolidado,
    'Receita Ldquida (12 meses)': receita_12,
    'EBIT (12 meses)': ebit_12,
    'Lucro Ldido (12 meses)': lucro_liq_12,
    'Receita Ldquida (3 meses)': receita_3m,
    'EBIT (3 meses)': ebit_3m,
    'Lucro Ldido (3 meses)': lucro_3m,
    'P/L': pl,
    'P/VP': p_vp,
    'P/EBIT': p_ebit,
    'PSR': psr,
    'P/Ativos': p_ativos,
    'P/Cap. Giro': p_cap_giro,
    'P/Ativ Circ Liq': p_ativ_circ_liq,
    'EV / EBITDA': ev_ebitda,
    'EV / EBIT': ev_ebit,
    'LPA': lpa,
    'VPA': vpa,
    'Marg. Bruta': round(marg_bruta,2),
    'Marg. EBIT': round(marg_ebit,2),
    'Marg. Ldcida': round(marg_liquida,2),
    'EBIT / Ativo': round(ebit_ativo,2),
    'ROIC': round(roic,2),
    'ROE': round(roe,2),
    'Liquidez Corr': liquidez_corr,
    'Div Br/ Patrim': divbr_patrim,
    'Giro Ativos': giro_ativos
}
# Print output in a way to capture
import json
print(json.dumps(results, ensure_ascii=False, indent=2))
"} }
steps.name: code_interpreter
